fields.description: Stable machine key (msa, sow, owner, rental, maintenance). Drives the contract numbering series and generation logic — do not change after contracts exist.
fields.label: Template Key

fields.description: Who the agreement is with: Customer for owner/rental/maintenance/architect contracts, Supplier for subcontractor agreements (matches the Subcontracting module's party model), Any Party for flexible agreements (NDA, Employee-Contractor) where the counterparty type is picked per contract.
fields.label: Party Type

fields.description: A contract from this template can only be created for a party with a Signed Master Subcontractor Agreement (used by the SOW).
fields.label: Requires Signed MSA

fields.description: Jinja HTML rendered with the Project Contract as context (doc, fill(), cb(), money(), dt() helpers — see process docs). Edit here when legal text changes; no deploy needed. Seeded from the version-controlled sources in templates/contracts/.
fields.label: Body (Jinja HTML)
